title: Korean-Style Pan-Seared Pak Choi Wrap
description: A simple and flavorful Korean-inspired dish featuring pan-seared pak choi wrapped in a ssam wrap.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tsp of sesame oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the pak choi to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes or until slightly wilted.
Add the Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the pan. Toss to coat the pak choi evenly.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the pak choi is tender.
Warm the ssam wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the pan-seared pak choi in the center of each wrap.
